title: Sound mod
description: this mod plays a sound when you kill a player.
body:
🔊 Custom Kill Sounds
A lightweight, client-side Minecraft mod that brings satisfying audio feedback to your PvP encounters. Every time you defeat a player, a sound plays to celebrate your victory!

✨ Features
Instant Feedback: Plays a sound immediately upon killing another player.

Fully Customizable: Don't like the default? Add your own sounds!

Easy Configuration: Change settings directly in-game.

🛠 Configuration
This mod is designed to be user-friendly. If you have Cloth Config API installed, you can access the settings easily:

Default Keybind: Press K in-game to open the configuration menu.

Options: Toggle the mod, adjust volume, or select different sound profiles.

🎵 Adding Custom Sounds
You can use your own audio files to make every kill unique!

[!IMPORTANT] The mod only supports the .ogg file format.

Navigate to your Minecraft instance folder.

Find the configuration folder for this mod.

Drop your .ogg files into the designated sounds folder.

Select your sound in the in-game menu (Key K).

🧩 Requirements (optional)
To get the most out of this mod, we recommend:

Cloth Config API – Required for the in-game configuration menu.
